TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_kaleseman_a_tademaw, title = kaleseman_a_tademaw, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/kaleseman_a_tademaw} }

S.FORM: kaleseman a tademawšļÜšłćŤĶ∑ÁöĄšļļÁČ© i kadipunan i tawyay henay i tada Sakul ku eneng nu nyadu', cacay ku wawa nu nyadu' ita lecuhan i Sakul, śúČšłÄŚÄčŚįŹŚ≠©Śú®SakulŚáļÁĒüšļÜ, balaki satu malakaleseman a tademaw, , inay' ku makasapenay cinidaan, šĽĖś≤íśúČmakasapenay, ś≤íśúČšļļśĮĒšĽĖťāĄśúČŤÉĹŚäõ, -sapenŤ∂ÖŤ∂ä uduma ku tanektek nu kidu , , malecad tu tama nu katalalan siluud ku ailucan, , -luud ŤāĆŤāČ -ailucanŚĺĆť†łťÉ® adih sa ku babalaki nu nyadu'ay, , awcaay kawmamasapen anubalaki, , u micidekay a tademaw ku tatidengan maudip saan, Kuni pitapal nu katuuday . . tatenga' yu masakapah kuudip, tulu apawti kuni tamudung nida tu tipus, - tamudungśČõ ma`kek amin ku katuuday tu icelang nu patelaw nya masakapahay . cika tenes matineng tu ku sakakaay nu dipun , ala hantu papinanam misemu . . malinga tu tu misemu ku kawaw nida, šĽĖťĖčŚßčŚįąťĖÄÁ∑īÁŅíÁõłśí≤, nama hida sakatineng nu binawlan, , lingud hantu nu kaying nu nyadu`ay, , Katuud ku namakacuwacuway a kaying, , milingling maydih a makadih tu pising nida. . katukuhan kuni papisetset nu kanatal nu dipun, alan cinida papisetset,ťē∑ŚģėŚįĪŚł∂šĽĖŚéĽśĮĒŤ≥Ĺ, mausaw habelut hannida ku katuuday , mademec amin ku wawa nu dipun, , sadikuday cacay ku makademecay icinidaan, , kyusa u sakatatusa cinida, nu hamin nu kanatal nu dipun, , matineng satu ku itaywanay a sakakaay nu dipun, ŤáļÁĀ£ťē∑ŚģėÁü•ťĀďŚźé, milasul tu papinanam papisalakyaw tu kaying nu nyadu` u sapilikeluh cinidaan taluma', , katukuh ikilay , ŚąįťĀĒŚ•áŤźä, namaka minatu katukuh i sakul a nyadu` kunipa likeluh nu sakakaay nu dipun, SakulťÉ®ŤźĹ, katukuh i sakul sipipacuk nu tumuk nu nyadu` tu katalalan palikeluh. . nanutawyay malakaka leseman tu ku sakul a nyadu` atu cinida mala kaleseman tu a tademaw nu nyadu`. Śĺěťā£śôāŚÄôSakul .
S.PHON: kar~…ĺ…ôs…ôman a tad…ômaw****** i kadipunan i tawjaj ńß…ônaj i tada sakur~…ĺ ku …ôn…ôŇč nu njadu Ē~ °, ¶a ¶aj ku wawa nu njadu Ē~ ° ita r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan i sakur~…ĺ, ******sakur~…ĺ***, bar~…ĺaki satu mar~…ĺakar~…ĺ…ôs…ôman a tad…ômaw, , inaj Ē~ ° ku makasap…ônaj ¶inidaan, ***makasap…ônaj, *********, -sap…ôn** uduma ku tan…ôkt…ôk nu kidu , , mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu tama nu katar~…ĺar~…ĺan sir~…ĺuud ku air~…ĺu ¶an, , -r~…ĺuud ** -air~…ĺu ¶an*** adińß sa ku babar~…ĺaki nu njadu Ē~ °aj, , aw ¶aaj kawmamasap…ôn anubar~…ĺaki, , u mi ¶id…ôkaj a tad…ômaw ku tatid…ôŇčan maudip saan, kuni pitapar~…ĺ nu katuudaj . . tat…ôŇča Ē~ ° ju masakapańß kuudip, tur~…ĺu apawti kuni tamuduŇč nida tu tipus, - tamuduŇč* ma`k…ôk amin ku katuudaj tu i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč nu pat…ôr~…ĺaw nja masakapańßaj . ¶ika t…ôn…ôs matin…ôŇč tu ku sakakaaj nu dipun , ar~…ĺa ńßantu papinanam mis…ômu . . mar~…ĺiŇča tu tu mis…ômu ku kawaw nida, *********, nama ńßida sakatin…ôŇč nu binawr~…ĺan, , r~…ĺiŇčud ńßantu nu kajiŇč nu njadu`aj, , katuud ku namaka ¶uwa ¶uwaj a kajiŇč, , mir~…ĺiŇčr~…ĺiŇč majdińß a makadińß tu pisiŇč nida. . katukuńßan kuni papis…ôts…ôt nu kanatar~…ĺ nu dipun, ar~…ĺan ¶inida papis…ôts…ôt,********, mausaw ńßab…ôr~…ĺut ńßannida ku katuudaj , mad…ôm…ô ¶ amin ku wawa nu dipun, , sadikudaj ¶a ¶aj ku makad…ôm…ô ¶aj i ¶inidaan, , kjusa u sakatatusa ¶inida, nu ńßamin nu kanatar~…ĺ nu dipun, , matin…ôŇč satu ku itajwanaj a sakakaaj nu dipun, *******, mir~…ĺasur~…ĺ tu papinanam papisar~…ĺakjaw tu kajiŇč nu njadu` u sapir~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńß ¶inidaan tar~…ĺuma Ē~ °, , katukuńß ikir~…ĺaj , ****, namaka minatu katukuńß i sakur~…ĺ a njadu` kunipa r~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńß nu sakakaaj nu dipun, sakur~…ĺ**, katukuńß i sakur~…ĺ sipipa ¶uk nu tumuk nu njadu` tu katar~…ĺar~…ĺan par~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńß. . nanutawjaj mar~…ĺakaka r~…ĺ…ôs…ôman tu ku sakur~…ĺ a njadu` atu ¶inida mar~…ĺa kar~…ĺ…ôs…ôman tu a tad…ômaw nu njadu`. ****sakur~…ĺ .
S.FORM: kaleseman a tademawšļÜšłćŤĶ∑ÁöĄšļļÁČ© i kadipunan i tawyay henay i tada Sakul ku eneng nu nyadu', cacay ku wawa nu nyadu' ita lecuhan i Sakul, śúČšłÄŚÄčŚįŹŚ≠©Śú®SakulŚáļÁĒüšļÜ, balaki satu malakaleseman a tademaw, , inay' ku makasapenay cinidaan, šĽĖś≤íśúČmakasapenay, ś≤íśúČšļļśĮĒšĽĖťāĄśúČŤÉĹŚäõ, -sapenŤ∂ÖŤ∂ä uduma ku tanektek nu kidu , , malecad tu tama nu katalalan siluud ku ailucan, , -luud ŤāĆŤāČ -ailucanŚĺĆť†łťÉ® adih sa ku babalaki nu nyadu'ay, , awcaay kawmamasapen anubalaki, , u micidekay a tademaw ku tatidengan maudip saan, Kuni pitapal nu katuuday . . tatenga' yu masakapah kuudip, tulu apawti kuni tamudung nida tu tipus, - tamudungśČõ ma`kek amin ku katuuday tu icelang nu patelaw nya masakapahay . cika tenes matineng tu ku sakakaay nu dipun , ala hantu papinanam misemu . . malinga tu tu misemu ku kawaw nida, šĽĖťĖčŚßčŚįąťĖÄÁ∑īÁŅíÁõłśí≤, nama hida sakatineng nu binawlan, , lingud hantu nu kaying nu nyadu`ay, , Katuud ku namakacuwacuway a kaying, , milingling maydih a makadih tu pising nida. . katukuhan kuni papisetset nu kanatal nu dipun, alan cinida papisetset,ťē∑ŚģėŚįĪŚł∂šĽĖŚéĽśĮĒŤ≥Ĺ, mausaw habelut hannida ku katuuday , mademec amin ku wawa nu dipun, , sadikuday cacay ku makademecay icinidaan, , kyusa u sakatatusa cinida, nu hamin nu kanatal nu dipun, , matineng satu ku itaywanay a sakakaay nu dipun, ŤáļÁĀ£ťē∑ŚģėÁü•ťĀďŚźé, milasul tu papinanam papisalakyaw tu kaying nu nyadu` u sapilikeluh cinidaan taluma', , katukuh ikilay , ŚąįťĀĒŚ•áŤźä, namaka minatu katukuh i sakul a nyadu` kunipa likeluh nu sakakaay nu dipun, SakulťÉ®ŤźĹ, katukuh i sakul sipipacuk nu tumuk nu nyadu` tu katalalan palikeluh. . nanutawyay malakaka leseman tu ku sakul a nyadu` atu cinida mala kaleseman tu a tademaw nu nyadu`. Śĺěťā£śôāŚÄôSakul .
S.PHON: kar~…ĺ…ôs…ôman a tad…ômaw****** i kadipunan i tawjaj ńß…ônaj i tada sakur~…ĺ ku …ôn…ôŇč nu njadu Ē~ °, ¶a ¶aj ku wawa nu njadu Ē~ ° ita r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan i sakur~…ĺ, ******sakur~…ĺ***, bar~…ĺaki satu mar~…ĺakar~…ĺ…ôs…ôman a tad…ômaw, , inaj Ē~ ° ku makasap…ônaj ¶inidaan, ***makasap…ônaj, *********, -sap…ôn** uduma ku tan…ôkt…ôk nu kidu , , mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu tama nu katar~…ĺar~…ĺan sir~…ĺuud ku air~…ĺu ¶an, , -r~…ĺuud ** -air~…ĺu ¶an*** adińß sa ku babar~…ĺaki nu njadu Ē~ °aj, , aw ¶aaj kawmamasap…ôn anubar~…ĺaki, , u mi ¶id…ôkaj a tad…ômaw ku tatid…ôŇčan maudip saan, kuni pitapar~…ĺ nu katuudaj . . tat…ôŇča Ē~ ° ju masakapańß kuudip, tur~…ĺu apawti kuni tamuduŇč nida tu tipus, - tamuduŇč* ma`k…ôk amin ku katuudaj tu i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč nu pat…ôr~…ĺaw nja masakapańßaj . ¶ika t…ôn…ôs matin…ôŇč tu ku sakakaaj nu dipun , ar~…ĺa ńßantu papinanam mis…ômu . . mar~…ĺiŇča tu tu mis…ômu ku kawaw nida, *********, nama ńßida sakatin…ôŇč nu binawr~…ĺan, , r~…ĺiŇčud ńßantu nu kajiŇč nu njadu`aj, , katuud ku namaka ¶uwa ¶uwaj a kajiŇč, , mir~…ĺiŇčr~…ĺiŇč majdińß a makadińß tu pisiŇč nida. . katukuńßan kuni papis…ôts…ôt nu kanatar~…ĺ nu dipun, ar~…ĺan ¶inida papis…ôts…ôt,********, mausaw ńßab…ôr~…ĺut ńßannida ku katuudaj , mad…ôm…ô ¶ amin ku wawa nu dipun, , sadikudaj ¶a ¶aj ku makad…ôm…ô ¶aj i ¶inidaan, , kjusa u sakatatusa ¶inida, nu ńßamin nu kanatar~…ĺ nu dipun, , matin…ôŇč satu ku itajwanaj a sakakaaj nu dipun, *******, mir~…ĺasur~…ĺ tu papinanam papisar~…ĺakjaw tu kajiŇč nu njadu` u sapir~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńß ¶inidaan tar~…ĺuma Ē~ °, , katukuńß ikir~…ĺaj , ****, namaka minatu katukuńß i sakur~…ĺ a njadu` kunipa r~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńß nu sakakaaj nu dipun, sakur~…ĺ**, katukuńß i sakur~…ĺ sipipa ¶uk nu tumuk nu njadu` tu katar~…ĺar~…ĺan par~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńß. . nanutawjaj mar~…ĺakaka r~…ĺ…ôs…ôman tu ku sakur~…ĺ a njadu` atu ¶inida mar~…ĺa kar~…ĺ…ôs…ôman tu a tad…ômaw nu njadu`. ****sakur~…ĺ .
